tasks_today.prompt:
Brother Tell me 
how ai's memory Works 
Can You tell me

Hello, hello, brother, I want your help. So the thing is, I am creating a website building platform where clients come to us and make websites. Now the twist is, I don't know coding. I only do white coding. And the second thing is, if it's an example, if I will go to Gemini or if I will go to Claude and says to create, give me a prompt for creating website, it will give me a random prompt and if I will use it in Codex or in Google Antigravity, it will be, means it will create the website will be broken, the website will be fully random, the text alignment will be not perfect, the alignment will be not perfect, the hero page will be not perfect, the section will be not perfect, the animation will be not perfect, and everything will be in neon randomized format. You know that thing the AI always create a very unprofessional random websites. So I don't want that. And in Claude I will create a project. I want your help to give you, give me a prompt for, means not the prompt, you give me an instruction which I will paste to the... Cloud project section means project instruction which I will paste there, and I want only this help and make sure it makes the prompt optimized for Codex and AntiGravity. I want only one prompt, not different-different, but that one prompt should be optimized because I will be using both the platforms to code, so it should be optimized for best results, and I want it to be like a top 1% developer and without hallucinating, and it should not create everything randomly, and when it gives the prompt, it should explain what we will create, and when I give the AI any question, it should ask the requirements, the MVP, it should ask the MVP, then it should give me the prompt. If any issues come, it should really help, not a basic thing, go there, go here, nothing, just an actual thing. It should provide me a prompt for analyzing the code, it should provide me a debugging prompt for that. I guess you have got my point, so please understand my things, and if you have any questions, then please ask me, I will fully answer you. And let's go, I guess.
